publications.tldr: Stress-testing how easily fine-tuning and tampering can strip safety from open LLMs.

publications.tldr: Fairer domain generalization for classes that appear in only one training domain.

publications.title: SafeTuneBed: A Safety Assessment Framework for Harmful Finetuning Defenses
publications.tldr: A unified benchmark for fairly comparing defenses against harmful LLM fine-tuning.

publications.title: LangDA: Language-guided Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation

publications.title: Are all classes created equal? Domain Generalization for Domain-Linked Classes
publications.tldr: Generalizing classes seen in only one training domain to new, unseen domains.
